He turned every opportunity down because in his own words "I left my own mark in that franchise and I feel like it would disrespect the nature of the character and the hard work put in to make that character memorable." At some point your integrity as an artist and the value you put in your own work comes into play. RDJ is rich. People will remember him selling out his character and the legacy he built for more zeros in his bank account. He can do what he wants but I won't watch marvel slop because he sold out.

author: @mythmurzin
text: tony stark iron man suit is made of titanium and gold and lots of high end electronics.  that stuff is very expensive, and no matter what hollywood would want you to believe, there is no way she could build a suit that comes close to what stark can do simply because of the resources he has.  it is about $30 per pound, and requires very expensive tools to melt it because it has a high melting point temperature, and gold costs like $25k per pound.  it is not something a high school girl would have access to in enough quantity or smelting resources to make.  that is one of the reasons why batman and ironman are such iconic superheroes.  not because of what they inherently can do, it is because what technology that someone else or they have made that their money opens up.

text: Iron man was always a A-tier for me personally, not generally I get that. author: @Hametsu-2000
text: Wouldn't it have made more sense to make Tony's daughter ironheart? Like they had the opportunity to make and use a completely new story with an original characters in Morgan stark's ironheart. Like imagine it being set 10 to 15 years later since endgame and Morgan is a young adult having to live in the massive shadow of her father just like tony and his father. She uses what she's inherited to help people, but struggles to make any connections as she knows at anytime people can just leave. So she's even more so focused on the mission just like tony was. The main villain could be wonder man as he has a vendetta against the stark name for turning him Into a literall monster and now Morgan has to deal with that. It would've been beautiful. A no brainer, but why expect anything great from marvel, when they've spent the past 6 years destroying any potential for great storytelling. F#%& the MCU.

author: @sethmcclain8517
text: I hate these stereotypes of how people view rich super heroes in comics, like yeah they’ve got money but it’s not like they’re blowing money for a random joyride into space. *wink wink.* They’re stopping maniacal lunatics and intergalactic warlords, they’re putting their lives on the line for people, which is rare considering our modern age.

author: @offilawNoone
text: But what's stopping them from having Tony Stark show up in some flashback of hers, where they'll show that she was there all along, did great things, and Tony was her mentor? They could very well make that a condition for his return, and the actor himself wouldn't turn down that much money. Actors don't care about stuff you care about.

text: I’ve been a long member of geeks and gamers Nerdrotic critical drinker everybody in that circle. All I don’t understand is some beef. A guy has a with you guys by the name of Ivan Ortega. I don’t know what he was saying and some of his comments people said yeah I don’t like those guys either because at one point is to be objective now they just cult always saying the same thing and I was like since when! but that’s not a big thing. It’s water under the bridge over the bridge whatever the saying goes. But I find it funny because I know Gary tries his hardest every day to be authentic. If there’s nothing good out there there he’ll say so but if there isn’t won’t ’ve it the credit and he has a great sense of humour and those guys make it laugh, and I know what he’s been through. I’m about 5/ 6 years younger than he is and I had a similar experience so I know he’s gone through he’s authentic person for sure.  himself so as will of  critical drinker  and all the other guys in your circle  I don’t know what this guy is doing but he used your whole geek’s and and gamers  logo just to put out a video.
